title: GARGANTOR OAK
summary: Human oak character design. Bark skin, rooted anatomy, and forest spirit presence built for a cinematic hero silhouette.
problem: Merge human readability with oak tree language so the figure feels alive, ancient, and believable as a forest guardian.
approach: Sculpted primary forms in ZBrush, refined bark planes and root structure in Blender, then layered moss, wood grain, and subsurface breakup in Substance.
outcome: Final beauty renders and process frames ready for portfolio and character design reels.

process.caption: Silhouette exploration and oak anatomy references for the human tree hybrid.
Primary sculpt pass, bark planes, and root mass before lookdev.
Beauty lighting and material polish for portfolio delivery.
